summary: All 3 fixes for iter_62 PASS. (1) Landing hero copy on /?unlock=mind-mapper67 contains 'Mind-Mapper — The NEW, advanced mind-map software' and the old phrase 'The mind map software' is absent. (2) Shift+drag selection rectangle works: drag from (500,350) to (1450,700) with Shift held — mid-drag [data-testid=mm-select-box] visible with offsetWidth=475; on release box disappears, c2 + c5 nodes both have outline 'rgb(255, 106, 213) dashed 2px' (multi-selected magenta dashed), and a toast 'Selected 2 nodes' fires. (2b) ArrowRight x3 with multi-selection nudges both nodes by dx=15.30/15.31 px (~3 × 6 logical × 0.85 zoom). (3) WordArt: right-clicking a text annotation opens a menu with all 10 preset buttons (data-testid=mm-annot-wordart-{key}-{annotId}) for plain/neonCyan/neonMagenta/gradient/goldFoil/outline/embossed/shadow/retro/inferno. neonCyan applies textShadow 'rgba(0, 240, 255, 0.95) 0px 0px 4px, ...' (multi-layer cyan glow); gradient applies WebkitTextFillColor:transparent (rgba(0,0,0,0)); plain reverts inline style — no transparent fill, fontSize drops back to 14px, color rgb(255,255,255). Regression smoke: bookmarks importer button visible, llm-fuel-gauge testid present, sidebar-collapse-btn collapses sidebar showing MENU toggle.

ui_bugs.issue: Same residual React 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning previously flagged in iter_61 still emits 1–2 times during the Shift+drag rectangle release / arrow-nudge sequence. Functionality is fully correct but indicates a setState cascade in a useEffect (likely the multiSelected Set creating a fresh identity each render, or selectedRef sync interplay). Non-blocking.

fix_results.FIX1_landing_hero_copy: PASS — Body contains 'Mind-Mapper — The NEW, advanced mind-map software'. Old copy 'The mind map software' (without NEW, advanced) is absent.
fix_results.FIX2_selection_rectangle_drag: PASS — Mid-drag mm-select-box offsetWidth=475 (visible). On release: select-box gone (count=0). 2 nodes (c2, c5) outlined 'rgb(255, 106, 213) dashed 2px'. Toast 'Selected 2 nodes' fires.
fix_results.FIX2b_arrow_nudge_multi_select: PASS — ArrowRight x3 → dx_c2=15.31, dx_c5=15.30 (target ~15.30 = 3 × 6 × 0.85). Both selected nodes shifted in lockstep.
fix_results.FIX3_wordart_presets: PASS — Right-click on a text annotation reveals all 10 preset buttons with the expected data-testid pattern. neonCyan: textShadow non-empty multi-layer cyan glow. gradient: WebkitTextFillColor='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)' (transparent). plain: inline style reverts (no WebkitTextFillColor:transparent), fontSize drops to 14px, color back to white.
fix_results.REGRESSION_bookmarks_importer: PASS — 'Import bookmarks' button visible in left sidebar.
fix_results.REGRESSION_sidebar_expand: PASS — [data-testid='sidebar-collapse-btn'] collapses left sidebar; collapsed state exposes MENU toggle button.

action_items: OPTIONAL — Investigate residual 'Maximum update depth exceeded' React warning carried over from iter_60/61. Now also reproduces during Shift+drag selection rectangle release. Likely cause: setMultiSelected receives a new Set identity each render and is referenced in a downstream useEffect dep array. Consider stabilising via useMemo / value-equality guard. Non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: wordartPresets.js is well-structured: 10 PURE-CSS presets, defensive getWordArtStyle helper falls back to plain on unknown key. Good choice to avoid SVG filters — inline editing stays flicker-free.

AnnotationsLayer.jsx text renderer at line 399–443 correctly derives fontSize from it.fontSize || 36 only when a style key is set, and falls back to 14 for the plain default. Style applied to inner text div / textarea (not the wrapper) — testers must read getComputedStyle on the inner div.whitespace-pre-wrap, NOT the outer [data-testid=mm-annot-text-...] wrapper. The review_request's selector hint was slightly off; updated for next agent.

MindMapCanvas.jsx selectBox state + ref pattern (line 1682–1803) is clean: ref carries live coords during drag (ducks rerender churn), state drives the visible overlay div. Hit-test on mouseup uses node centre — matches spec.
Console 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning persists from iter_60/61 — third iteration this has surfaced. Worth a focused fix pass even though end-user functionality is unaffected.
seed_data_creation: None — used the seeded Map Title demo (MAP TITLE + 5 children + 1 standalone node).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three iter_62 fixes verified PASS. Test playbook: (1) Tour dismiss via [data-testid=tour-skip]. (2) Analytics decline by JS-clicking the button whose textContent === 'decline'. (3) For Shift+drag, start at canvas-empty point AVOIDING the toolbar at y<210 — (500,350) to (1450,700) works. (4) For WordArt verification, do NOT read getComputedStyle on the [data-testid=mm-annot-text-<id>] wrapper. The wordart styles live on an inner div.whitespace-pre-wrap or the textarea (last child). Use selector w.querySelectorAll('div.whitespace-pre-wrap, textarea')[last]. Otherwise checks will spuriously fail. (5) Residual 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warning still emits — carried over from iter_60/61, NOT a new regression.
